basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 19 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 19 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions. Candidates with a maximum age of 32 years and holding a Postgraduate degree in Basic Sciences, Engineering, Management, or Technology with the prescribed minimum marks are eligible to apply online on or before 31 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years as on 31-07-2026. Age relaxation of 5% marks or 0.5 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation in Basic Sciences/Engineering/Management/Technology with 60% aggregate marks (CGPA 6.5/10) for GEN; relaxed for SC/ST/PwD
qualification.details: Post-graduation in Basic Sciences/ Engineering/ Management/ Technology with 60% aggregate marks/ Average (CGPA) 6.5 on a 10-point scale for GEN, relaxed by 5% or CGPA 0.5 for SC/ ST/ PwD from UGC recognized University/ Institute/ Autonomous bodies. Final year Master's applicants may apply if results submitted by 31-08-2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Post-graduation in Basic Sciences/ Engineering/ Management/ Technology with 60% aggregate marks/ Average (CGPA) 6.5 on a 10-point scale for GEN, relaxed by 5% or CGPA 0.5 for SC/ ST/ PwD from UGC recognized University/ Institute/ Autonomous bodies. Final year Master's applicants may apply if results submitted by 31-08-2026.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years as on 31-07-2026. Age relaxation of 5% marks or 0.5 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD candidates.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions at NIT Kurukshetra is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts in the NIT Kurukshetra Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post-graduation degree in Basic Sciences, Engineering, Management, or Technology with at least 60% aggregate marks (or CGPA 6.5/10) for General candidates. SC/ST/PwD candidates have relaxed criteria.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years as of 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow posts will involve a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can final year Master's students apply for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, final year Master's students can apply, provided they submit their results by 31st August 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow positions at NIT Kurukshetra are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra for further details.
